## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes with no errors
- [ ] `npm test` passes with no failures
- [ ] `npm run build` has been run and `dist/` is committed
- [ ] New inputs/outputs are documented in `action.yml` and `README.md`
- [ ] No secrets, webhook URLs, or sensitive data are included
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (for features and bug fixes)
